scripts.validate: node tools/validate-static-site.mjs && node tools/validate-thankyou-context.mjs && node tools/validate-catalog-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-homepage-object-cta.mjs && node tools/validate-contacts-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-mortgage-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-contextual-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-lead-source-output.mjs && node tools/validate-form-role-analytics.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-events.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-debug-mode.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-scenarios.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-results.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs
scripts.validate:launch-readiness: node --check tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs && node --check tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs && node tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/launch-readiness-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/launch-readiness-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.gates)||data.gates.length!==10||data.summary?.total_gates!==10||data.summary?.passed!==1||data.summary?.blocked!==9||data.summary?.total_profiles!==3||data.summary?.ready_profiles!==0||data.metrics?.form_qa?.not_run!==42||data.metrics?.sources?.pending!==14||data.metrics?.projects?.public_ready!==0||data.metrics?.campaigns?.prepared_links!==11||data.metrics?.campaigns?.published_placements!==0) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated launch gates: ${data.gates.length}; ready profiles: ${data.summary.ready_profiles}`);'
scripts.validate:source-collection: node --check tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node --check tools/build-source-collection-report.mjs && node tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node tools/build-source-collection-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/source-collection-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/source-collection-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.tasks)||data.tasks.length!==14||data.summary?.total_projects!==3||data.summary?.total_tasks!==14||data.summary?.pending_tasks!==14||data.summary?.by_status?.accepted!==0||data.summary?.by_status?.missing!==14) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated source collection tasks: ${data.tasks.length}; accepted: ${data.summary.by_status.accepted}`);'
scripts.validate:project-readiness: node --check tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node --check tools/build-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/build-project-readiness-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/project-readiness-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/project-readiness-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.projects)||data.projects.length!==3||data.summary?.total_projects!==3||data.summary?.public_ready!==0||data.summary?.requires_recheck!==1||data.summary?.requires_sources!==2||data.summary?.projects_with_noindex!==3) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated project readiness rows: ${data.projects.length}; public ready: ${data.summary.public_ready}`);'
scripts.validate:verification: node tools/validate-project-verification.mjs && npm run validate:project-readiness && npm run validate:source-collection && npm run validate:launch-readiness
scripts.validate:analytics-funnel: node --check tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node --check tools/build-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/build-analytics-funnel-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/analytics-funnel-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/analytics-funnel-report.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="specification_only_no_live_data"||!Array.isArray(data.metrics)||data.metrics.length!==19||!Array.isArray(data.views)||data.views.length!==6) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated funnel metrics: ${data.metrics.length}; views: ${data.views.length}`);'
scripts.validate:campaign-publications: node --check tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node --check tools/build-campaign-publication-report.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node tools/build-campaign-publication-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/campaign-publication-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/campaign-publication-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.campaigns)||data.campaigns.length!==11||data.summary?.total_campaigns!==11) process.exit(1); const total=Object.values(data.summary.by_status||{}).reduce((sum,value)=>sum+value,0); if(total!==11) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated campaign publication rows: ${data.campaigns.length}; placements: ${data.summary.total_publications}`);'
scripts.validate:campaign-release: node --check tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node --check tools/build-campaign-release-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node tools/build-campaign-release-pack.mjs --format=json > /tmp/campaign-release-pack.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/campaign-release-pack.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.links)||data.links.length!==11) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated campaign release links: ${data.links.length}`);' && npm run validate:campaign-publications
